key_finding: DECISIVE NULL RESULT: Gold-standard double dissociation finds ZERO selectivity effect within position bands. Within Q3: SelAC acc = SelTC acc = 23.5% (IDENTICAL). Within Q4: SelAC = SelTC = 17.6% (IDENTICAL). AC/TC selectivity adds zero explanatory power beyond position. Strong POSITIONAL dissociation discovered: late positions affect accuracy 59x more than text (64.7% acc drop vs 1.1% text drop at 5%). Confirms pre-registered Scenario B (55% confidence).
evidence_impact: Decisively closes the spatial selectivity question. The selectivity framework (AC vs TC position classification) is uninformative for answer accuracy on Qwen-Base. Functional separability, if it exists, must be GEOMETRIC (direction vs magnitude in representation space) not SPATIAL (specific token positions). The positional dissociation (late=accuracy, early=everything) is the real finding — it suggests answer computation relies on late KV entries not needed for text prediction.
next_planned: Priority experiments: (1) Direction-only vs magnitude-only KV perturbation at late positions — test geometric double dissociation (inspired by 2602.11169). (2) Cross-model replication of positional dissociation on Llama-3.1-8B and Qwen-Instruct. (3) Fine-grained position sweep (10 bins) to locate dissociation transition point.

null_space_existence.status: strong (PGD-validated on Qwen). Independent support from Reasoning Theater, KV steering

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED: gold-standard double dissociation shows ZERO selectivity effect within position bands. Functional separability is geometric, not spatial

positional_dissociation.status: NEW: late positions selectively carry answer info (59x ratio acc/text). Early positions are infrastructure. Strong finding replicated at 5% and 10% noise

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. R-KV shows removing redundant tokens IMPROVES reasoning

cross_model_replication.status: Position dominates ALL models. Positional dissociation untested on other models

encoding_strategy.status: Digital (Qwen) vs distributed (Llama). Geometric separation hypothesis needs testing

literature_convergence.status: 5+ independent groups converge on 'text is lossy projection'. Our results consistent with geometric interpretation
